C Go Python Ruby PHP Perl Lua R Julia Elixir Clojure AWK Tcl PowerShell Rust Swift Kotlin Haskell

R functions in TypeScript

TypeScript implementations of 13 R standard library functions across 1 module. Each function is individually importable and tree-shakeable.

base
  • abs
  • ceiling
  • floor
  • match
  • max
  • min
  • nchar
  • round
  • seq
  • sign
  • sqrt
  • tolower
  • toupper

We have 13 R functions so far - help us add more

Got a rainy Sunday afternoon and a taste for a porting puzzle?

  • Get inspiration from the R base documentation.
  • Click "New file" in the appropriate folder on GitHub. This will fork the project to your account, directly add the file to it, and send a Pull Request to us.

We will then review it. If it's useful to the project and in line with our contributing guidelines your work will become part of Locutus and you'll be automatically credited in the authors section accordingly.

Upstream Surface Inventory 13/7545 shipped · 44 next 0%

Locutus tracks 29 upstream namespaces for R and sorts them into what is already shipped, what we still want, what we intentionally keep, and what still needs a decision.

This inventory now tracks R's full official base and recommended-package surface from the parity target, with new packages defaulting conservative until reviewed.

0% catalog shipped
Shipped Next Explicit non-goals
base 1% stats 0% grDevices 0% utils 0% boot 0% class 0% cluster 0% codetools 0% compiler 0% datasets 0% foreign 0% graphics 0% grid 0% KernSmooth 0% lattice 0% MASS 0% Matrix 0% methods 0% mgcv 0% nlme 0% nnet 0% parallel 0% rpart 0% spatial 0% splines 0% stats4 0% survival 0% tcltk 0% tools 0%
Tracked namespaces 29
Shipped 13/7545
Next to port 44
Explicit non-goals 7488

Next

Aggregate predicate helpers are strong plain-value targets.

  • all
  • any

Vector concatenation helpers have a clean plain-value contract.

  • append

Scalar math helpers remain useful plain-value targets.

  • cos
  • sin

Sequence differencing has a clean plain-value contract.

  • diff

Duplicate detection is a strong plain-value target.

  • duplicated

String boundary helpers are strong portability targets.

  • endsWith
  • startsWith

Regex predicate helpers are strong portability targets.

  • grepl

Regex replacement helpers are strong portability targets.

  • gsub
  • sub

Aggregate math helpers remain useful portability targets.

  • mean

Ordering helpers are useful plain-value targets.

  • order
  • rank
  • sort

Elementwise aggregate helpers have a clean plain-value contract.

  • pmax
  • pmin

String slicing helpers are strong portability targets.

  • substr

Trimming helpers are strong plain-value targets.

  • trimws

De-duplication has a clean plain-value contract.

  • unique

Index selection helpers have a clean plain-value contract.

  • which
  • which.max
  • which.min
Explicit non-goals (1233)
  • - Skip R base mixes language syntax, S3/S4 dispatch, environments, and host-runtime state too broadly for one direct Locutus wishlist.

stats

0% shipped
0/9 shipped 9 next 893 explicit non-goals

Next

Correlation helpers are strong plain-value statistical targets.

  • cor

Covariance helpers are strong plain-value statistical targets.

  • cov

Five-number summaries produce a clean numeric-array result.

  • fivenum

Robust scalar statistics are useful plain-value targets.

  • mad

Aggregate statistics helpers are strong plain-value portability targets.

  • median
  • sd
  • var

Quantile helpers return a clean numeric summary result.

  • quantile

Weighted aggregation has a clean plain-value contract.

  • weighted.mean
